channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] Ford rehires 'gray beard' engineers after AI falls short
item.description: Ford rehires 'gray beard' engineers after AI falls short

item.title: [Hacker News] Librepods: AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem
item.description: Librepods: AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem

item.title: [Hacker News] GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
item.description: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks

item.title: [Interconnects] Artifacts 22: Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
item.description: Artifacts 22: Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem

item.title: [OpenAI] HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
item.description: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI

item.title: [Hacker News] Professor denounces mass AI fraud on an exam at Brown
item.description: Professor denounces mass AI fraud on an exam at Brown

item.title: [Hacker News] I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI
item.description: I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI

item.title: [Hacker News] Daisugi, the Japanese technique of growing trees out of other trees (2020)
item.description: Daisugi, the Japanese technique of growing trees out of other trees (2020)

item.title: [Hacker News] Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models
item.description: Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models

item.title: [Hacker News] A way to exclude sensitive files issue still open for OpenAI Codex
item.description: A way to exclude sensitive files issue still open for OpenAI Codex

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101 — Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.
item.description: GitHub project explains complex systems with visuals and simple terms to prepare for system design interviews.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] usestrix/strix — Open-source AI hackers to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
item.description: Open-source AI tool for detecting and fixing software vulnerabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] browser-use/video-use — Edit videos with coding agents
item.description: GitHub's browser-use/video-use project enables video editing through AI coding agents.

item.title: [Hacker News] Wayfinder Router: deterministic routing of queries between local and hosted LLM
item.description: Wayfinder Router: deterministic routing of queries between local and hosted LLM

item.title: [Hacker News] Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly
item.description: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly

item.title: [Hacker News] Response to AI slop is from Robin Williams
item.description: Response to AI slop is from Robin Williams

item.title: [Hacker News] What Ozempic does to the gut-brain axis
item.description: What Ozempic does to the gut-brain axis

item.title: [Hacker News] 'Careless People' author claims Meta surveilled her for 12mos to enforce silence
item.description: 'Careless People' author claims Meta surveilled her for 12mos to enforce silence

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: Adrafinil – keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work
item.description: Show HN: Adrafinil – keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work

item.title: [Hacker News] Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models
item.description: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/topoteretes — Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
item.description: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform that enables agents to maintain persistent long-term memory across sessions using a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] hugohe3/ppt-master — AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He
item.description: ppt-master generates native, editable PowerPoint from documents with animations, speaker note audio narration, and template support.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI — Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
item.description: Open-source AI image and video generation platform featuring 200+ models, no content filters, and self-hosted deployment.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/luongnv89 — A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
item.description: Repository offering visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code from basic concepts to advanced agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/anomalyco — The open source coding agent.
item.description: anomalyco, an open source coding agent, is trending on GitHub.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Fission-AI/OpenSpec — Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.
item.description: OpenSpec introduces spec-driven development for AI coding assistants.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading — "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
item.description: Vibe-Trading, a GitHub trending repository, is a personal trading agent application.

item.title: [Hacker News] DeepSeek open-sources inference optimizations with 60–85% faster generation [pdf]
item.description: DeepSeek open-sources inference optimizations with 60–85% faster generation [pdf]

item.description: [AINews] OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna — restricted to trusted partners

item.description: Anatomy of a Failed (Nation-State?) Attack

item.description: US allows Anthropic to release Mythos to 'trusted partners'

item.description: U.S. allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI to ‘trusted’ US organizations

item.title: [Hacker News] AI in mathematics is forcing big questions
item.description: AI in mathematics is forcing big questions

item.description: The gap between open weights LLMs and closed source LLMs

item.description: What happened after 2,000 people tried to hack my AI assistant

item.description: U.S. government will decide who gets to use GPT-5.6

item.description: Quoting OpenAI

item.description: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor

item.description: Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences

item.description: Paving the way for AI agents in biology

item.description: Making Claude a chemist

item.description: Anthropic's core views on AI safety

item.description: Introducing Claude Corps

item.description: DXC integrates Claude into systems regulated industries rely on

item.title: [Anthropic] TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic opens Seoul office
item.description: Anthropic opens Seoul office

item.title: [Anthropic] How Claude Code is used in practice
item.description: How Claude Code is used in practice

item.title: [Hacker News] Ultrasound imaging of the brain
item.description: Ultrasound imaging of the brain

item.title: [GitHub Trending] commaai/openpilot — openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
item.description: OpenPilot, a robotics operating system, upgrades driver assistance systems on 300+ supported vehicle models.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill — 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。
item.description: GitHub project implementing Zhang Xuefeng cognitive framework for career and educational planning guidance.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Panniantong/Agent-Reach — Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
item.description: Agent-Reach CLI tool enables AI agents to search and read content from multiple platforms including Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and XiaoHongShu without API fees.

item.title: [OpenAI] Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HierBias: Context-Conditioned Hierarchical Media Bias Detection with Multi-Task Type Classification
item.description: HierBias detects media bias by leveraging document context alongside sentence-level analysis, achieving state-of-the-art results through hierarchical and multi-task learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Know2Guess: A Contamination-Aware Multi-Zone Benchmark for Knowledge-Boundary Evaluation in Large Language Models
item.description: Know2Guess benchmark evaluates LLM reliability by distinguishing answerable knowledge from abstention-expected unknowns while accounting for data contamination.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Helpfulness Hurts: Domain-Dependent Degradation of Mid-Trained Compassion Values Under Post-Training
item.description: Helpfulness-focused post-training degrades animal compassion and moral reasoning in language models relative to coding-focused training, with language-dependent transfer patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Investigating LLM's Problem Solving Capability -- a Study on Statics Questions
item.description: LLMs achieve high accuracy on text-only statics problems but show reduced performance with diagrams due to difficulties in multi-step reasoning and visual information integration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Assert, don't describe: Linguistic features that shift LLM reasoning about animal welfare
item.description: Research shows assertive language and explicit moral vocabulary strengthen LLM preference for pro-animal-welfare reasoning, while hedging weakens it.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Context Recycling for Long-Horizon LLM Inference
item.description: ContextForge reduces token consumption in multi-turn LLM conversations through efficient context recycling while preserving response accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reducing Conversational Escalation in Large Language Model Dialogue with Nonviolent Communication Constraints
item.description: Nonviolent Communication-inspired prompting constraints reduce conversational escalation in LLM interactions, improving de-escalation with resistant users in conflict situations.
